title: The Steppe
writer: Anton Chekhov, Enzo Curreli, Alberto Lattuada
actors: Charles Vanel, Daniele Spallone, Cristina Gaioni
plot: In 19th century Russia, an 8 year-old boy is sent from his home village to the big city to go to school. On his long way there, he gets to witness the often harsh realities of life in the steppe. Based on allegorical novel by Chek...
